privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated video data created dynamically via FFmpeg in setup_task.sh. The occupation claim of 'Content Operations Specialist' mapped to SOC 27-4099 is contradicted, as O*NET explicitly defines SOC 27-4099 as 'Media and Communication Equipment Workers, All Other'.
